items.title: Medication Shortage Update: Hard-To-Find Prescriptions in Stock in Detroit
items.summary: National shortages continue to affect ADHD medications, GLP-1 medications like semaglutide (Ozempic, Wegovy) and tirzepatide (Mounjaro, Zepbound), and several antibiotics. As an independent Detroit pharmacy, we source from multiple wholesalers - check our live availability or call (313) 519-5700. Valid prescription required.

items.title: Walk-In Flu, COVID-19, RSV and Shingles (Shingrix) Vaccines - Detroit 48223
items.summary: No appointment needed at our Fenkell Ave pharmacy. Most vaccines are $0 with Medicare Part B, Part D, or private insurance - we verify your coverage before administering.

items.title: Free Same-Day Prescription Delivery Across Northwest Detroit
items.summary: Home delivery is always free within our service area - North Rosedale, Brightmoor, Old Redford, Grandmont, Redford Township, and Southfield. Refills, transfers, and new prescriptions all qualify.
